# Fixture Directory

This directory stores interoperability fixtures:

- `schemas/`: SBE XML schemas used by tests and code generation checks.
- `java/`: binaries generated by the Java reference implementation.

Use the Phase 0 CLI utilities to manage fixture files:

```bash
python -m pysbe fixtures init
python -m pysbe fixtures import-schema path/to/schema.xml
python -m pysbe fixtures import-java path/to/fixture.bin
python -m pysbe fixtures list
```
